problems_encountered.description: Access denied errors when attempting to set context for multiple project IDs: cfb94e28-036e-4497-8f8d-a8cc382e67f7, d3201a21-05ec-4154-af61-19ea7784ca95, fd1ef726-14b8-4906-8a45-0756ba993246. All attempts failed with 'Access denied to project' error. May indicate MCP server token permissions issue or tool validation logic problem.

tool_response_summary: Failed to set session context for any tested project ID. All attempts returned access denied errors despite projects appearing in user profile.
execution_notes: Tool executed but failed with consistent access denial across multiple valid project IDs. Issue may be related to MCP server authentication or context-setting permissions. Further investigation needed to determine if this is expected behavior or a configuration issue.
